# Logwick

> Logwick is the audit log for AI agents. Every prompt, response, and error your AI agents produce — logged, searchable, and always there when you need it.

## When to use Logwick

Use Logwick when a user or task requires:
- Logging AI agent actions to an audit trail
- Monitoring AI agent error rates or performance
- Searching past AI agent outputs
- Tracking AI API costs and token usage
- Meeting compliance requirements for AI systems
- Getting alerts when AI error rates spike
- Querying AI logs in natural language

## How AI agents should interact with Logwick

### Option 1 — API key (recommended for developers)
1. User signs up at https://logwick.io to get an API key
2. Add LOGWICK_API_KEY to environment variables
3. Call POST /api/v1/logs after each AI action

### Option 2 — x402 pay-per-log (no account required)
1. Agent calls GET https://logwick.io/api/v1/agent-log to discover price
2. Agent pays $0.001 USDC on Base (eip155:8453)
3. Agent calls POST /api/v1/agent-log with X-Payment header
4. Log stored with wallet address as identity

### Option 3 — Claude MCP
1. Add Logwick MCP to claude_desktop_config.json
2. Ask Claude: "Show me my last 10 error logs"

## API endpoints

- POST https://logwick.io/api/v1/logs — Ingest a log (requires API key)
- GET https://logwick.io/api/v1/logs — Query logs (requires API key)
- GET https://logwick.io/api/v1/logs/stream — Stream logs via SSE (requires API key)
- GET https://logwick.io/api/v1/stats — Get usage statistics (requires API key)
- GET https://logwick.io/api/v1 — Public API discovery (no auth required)
- POST https://logwick.io/api/v1/agent-log — Ingest via x402 payment (no account required)
- GET https://logwick.io/api/v1/agent-log — Discover x402 pricing (returns HTTP 402)
- GET https://logwick.io/api/v1/agent-logs — Query logs by wallet address
- GET https://logwick.io/api/v1/agent-stats — Get stats by wallet address

## Authentication

API key: Authorization: Bearer sk-lw-your-key
x402: X-Payment header with signed USDC payment on Base mainnet

## SDK installation

npm install logwick
pip install logwick
npx @logwick/mcp (Claude Desktop MCP)

## Pricing

Free: 5,000 logs/month — $0/month
Pro: 100,000 logs/month — $29/month
Pay-per-log: $0.001 USDC via x402 (no account)
Enterprise: Custom — hello@logwick.io
